title: Tolerable Creepers
description: Updates Creepers, causing them to summon Creepies when exploding, but removing their ability to break blocks!
body:
# Tolerable Creepers

**Make creepers no longer grief unjustly**, making them a more challenging and interesting enemy: they spawn creepies now! When Creepers blow up, a cloud of spores is released, which will generate terrible foes - Creepies. 

**Creeper spores** can be harvested by killing a creeper with explosions, allowing you to summon your very own loyal creepies that'll attack anything you hit.
This mod also comes with Mischief Arrows (for pranking purposes) and Spore Crates for storage.

There's additional integration when [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) is installed, adding throwable Spore Bombs!

In the mod's config file, custom behavior can be obtained, such as restoring Creeper Griefing.

---
